MINI MINUTES: Dept. 613: Case is called for settlement conference. Court and counsel confer re: settlement in chambers. Proceedings not reported. Settlement conference continued to 11:00am, June 14,2002 in Dept. 613. Judge: Lillian K. Sing, Clerk: Robert Goulding, Todd D.Reeves attorney for plaintiff Janet Rager, Sherry Santa Cruz attorney for Intervenor Liberty Mutual InsuranceCo., Jane Hillebrand attorney for Defendant Rudolph Commercial Interiors,inc., Stephen Ciotoli attorney for Defendant Oakhill Washington, LLC,Thomas Beatty attorney for Kennedy Wilson International, present.
